$comment: ÚNICA fuente editable desde 2026-07-04 (contracts/ raíz y specs/001 son punteros). v1.1 (MINOR, feature 003-atribucion-factualidad): adds optional quality_gates. v1.2 (MINOR, 2026-07-04, pirámide de prosa): adds optional sector and registro; sector already era escrito por speckit.constitution pero no estaba declarado (con additionalProperties:false el manifiesto no validaba). v1.2.1 (PATCH, 2026-07-04): sector admite null (bootstrap escribe null hasta que speckit.constitution lo fija; un proyecto recién creado no validaba). v1.3 (MINOR, feature 004-vivarium-core): adds optional mode and mode_history (constitución v1.6.0 § Modos de proyecto; ausencia de mode = produccion).
title: Write.OnMars Project Manifest v1.3.0
description: Manifest declared by every editorial project that uses the Write.OnMars harness. Produced by `writeonmars-install` (FR-001..FR-004) and updated when versions, signing matrix or operators change.

framework_version.description: Semver of the Write.OnMars framework installed in this project.

constitution_version.description: Semver of the constitution under which the project operates.

agent_target.description: Primary agent used to operate the framework. v1 prioritises claude-code.

path.description: Optional explicit path when symlinked or relocated.

skills.description: Skills enabled in the project. Bundled = shipped by Write.OnMars (e.g. /marcela-prose, /technical-guide-design, writeonmars-*). External = installed by the operator from another source.

research_mode.description: byom = the project relies on external MCPs that comply with the citation contract (default v1). bundled = the project activates writeonmars-research as the canonical research+contrast MCP.

signing_matrix.description: Per-pass signing policy. v1 default: pasadas 1, 2, 5 = autonomous; pasadas 3, 4 = human.

id.description: Stable identifier used in pass signatures.

human_operators.description: Humans authorised to sign passes flagged as 'human' in signing_matrix.

citation_contract_version.description: Citation contract version this project supports. Records emitted by MCPs are validated against this version.

sector.description: Optional. Slug of the sector base applied to the project addenda (references/sectores/<slug>.md). Written by speckit.constitution; null until then (bootstrap default).

mode.description: Modo de trabajo del proyecto (constitución v1.6.0 § Modos de proyecto). Ausencia = produccion. produccion: la IA redacta anclada en fuentes. estudio: el humano escribe; la IA no redacta prosa del manuscrito.

mode_history.description: Registro append-only de cambios de modo. Cada cambio lo escribe una acción humana explícita (vivarium mode set --yes o edición manual documentada).

registro.description: Optional. Slug of the prose register (layer 2 of the prose pyramid) applied to the guide (references/registros/<slug>/SKILL.md). Written by speckit.constitution; defaults to the sector's proposed register when absent.

project_type.description: Optional. Selects the mode of `.specify/templates/*` consumed by Spec Kit. `editorial` activates the brief of nine fields, the temario / descripciones encadenadas, the five-pasada checklist materialisation and the editorial Constitution Check. `software` keeps the classic Spec Kit behaviour. `mixed` renders both. Default behaviour when absent: software.

memory_external.description: Optional vector memory configuration. Cache only; never source of truth (constitution § Arquitectura del framework).

quality_gates.description: Optional quality gates beyond criticals/signatures/completeness (feature 003-atribucion-factualidad). Cache de política, no fuente de verdad. Cuando se omite, status.py se comporta como en v1.0 (gates g1·g2·g3).

factuality_min.description: Piso del índice de factualidad global para cerrar (g4).

factuality_mode.description: advisory = informa pero no bloquea closeable; blocking = g4 entra en closeable.

signingPolicy.description: autonomous = pass closes when checklist is green. human = an operator listed in human_operators must sign.
